title: Review of the Neural Oscillations Underlying Meditation.

assets.abstract: Objective: Meditation is one type of mental training that has been shown to produce many cognitive benefits. Meditation practice is associated with improvement in concentration and reduction of stress, depression, and anxiety symptoms. Furthermore, different forms of meditation training are now being used as interventions for a variety of psychological and somatic illnesses. These benefits are thought to occur as a result of neurophysiologic changes. The most commonly studied specific meditation

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.
